allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\(process.env.USERPROFILE+''/Downloads/trading-journal-backup-2026-03-26 \(2\).json''\); console.log\(''Keys:'', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\(''Trades:'', d.trades?.length\); console.log\(''TradePlans:'', d.tradePlans?.length\); if\(d.trades?.length\) console.log\(''Sample trade keys:'', Object.keys\(d.trades[0]\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(process.env.USERPROFILE+''/Downloads/trading-journal-backup-2026-03-26 \(2\).json''\); console.log\(''Plans:'', d.plans?.length\); if\(d.plans?.length\) console.log\(''Sample plan keys:'', Object.keys\(d.plans[0]\)\); console.log\(''Tags:'', d.tags?.length\); console.log\(''Rules:'', d.rules?.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(process.env.USERPROFILE+''/Downloads/trading-journal-backup-2026-03-26 \(2\).json''\); console.log\(''plans type:'', typeof d.plans\); console.log\(''plans:'', JSON.stringify\(d.plans\).substring\(0,200\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(process.env.USERPROFILE+''/Downloads/trading-journal-backup-2026-03-26 \(2\).json''\); console.log\(''All keys:'', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\(''plans count:'', Object.keys\(d.plans\).length\); console.log\(''plan dates:'', Object.keys\(d.plans\).slice\(0,5\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(process.env.USERPROFILE+''/Downloads/trading-journal-backup-2026-03-26 \(2\).json''\); const t=d.trades; const updated = t.filter\(t => Object.keys\(t\).length > 10\); console.log\(''Trades with extra fields:'', updated.length\); console.log\(''All unique trade keys:'', [...new Set\(t.flatMap\(t=>Object.keys\(t\)\)\)]\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(process.env.USERPROFILE+''/Downloads/trading-journal-backup-2026-03-26 \(2\).json''\); console.log\(''trades sample with tags:''\); d.trades.filter\(t=>t.tags\).slice\(0,3\).forEach\(t=>console.log\(t.id, t.tags, t.notes?.substring\(0,50\)\)\)")
